text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: -> (request-approval; guard status=PENDING_ONBOARDING) -> PENDING_APPROVAL -> (approve; guard status=PENDING_APPROVAL + qualification complete) -> ONBOARDED -> (offboard; guard status=ONBOARDED) -> OFFBOARDED (terminal). Edit on ONBOARDED/PENDING_APP
ROVAL reverts to PENDING_APPROVAL; isErpSynced reset to false on every update; ERP-sync toggle allowed only when ONBOARDED. ONBOARDED

-> SUSPENDED on failed audit / quality stop / expired ISO cert / sanctions hit / active CAPA (blocks new POs without offboarding); SUSPENDED -> ONBOARDED on resolution. SUPPLIER_APPROVAL_REQUESTED notification fires only at request-approval. Wrong-status transitions -> BadReque

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Bulk import: exact header (no missing/extra, order-insensitive); per-row validate + resolve refs; ACCUMULATE all errors (never fail-fast); all-or-nothing single transaction; upsert by natural key = code; duplicate keys last-wins; imported records default PENDING_ONBOARDING; audit only on

successful commit; row numbering header=1, first data=2. ISO attribute groups (risk 31000, security 28000, continuity 22301, ESG 20400/14001, infosec 27001, anti-bribery 37001) each carry last-assessed / next-due / evidence+expiry / corrective-action log; all thresholds are configurable defaults
